scope: Staff accountability carryover into officer history
Desktop QA only; mobile is outside the current target
flow: Clicked 選抜部隊で戦闘開始.
Verified the 参謀責任 block in After Action.
Clicked 結果を反映して幕舎へ.
Verified staff-accountability entries in officer histories.
observations: After Action showed 参謀長 アルンハイム: 警告 / 戦線整理不足 / 戦線100%で撤退判断 / 教訓 戦線整理警告 / 経験+1 / 疲労+4.
After Action showed 兵站主任 ヴェーバー: 功績 / 補給維持 / 補給点係争 / 平均弾薬81 / 教訓 補給維持 / 経験+3 / 疲労+1.
After Action showed 工兵主任 メッツ: 功績 / 築城線維持 / 損傷14 / 稼働施設1 / 教訓 築城維持 / 経験+3 / 疲労+1.
After Action showed 砲兵主任 バウアー: 警告 / 火力効果限定 / 敵制圧0% / 発生波0 / 教訓 火力効果警告 / 経験+1 / 疲労+4.
The Officers tab retained the same staff accountability entries in recent officer history with 経験+ and 疲労+ values.
notes: The QA used a quick withdraw result because this slice validates result generation, After Action display, and officer-history carryover rather than long battle balance.
Mobile QA was intentionally skipped because the current goal excludes cellphone/mobile support.
